Eid Mubarak

✦ 2026 ✦

❧ عيد مبارك وكل عام وأنتم بخير ❧

Wishing you and your family a blessed Eid filled with happiness,
peace, and everlasting prosperity. May Allah shower His blessings
upon you on this joyous occasion.

— Warm Wishes From — Ahmad

✦ Duas & Islamic Quotes ✦

Words of blessing for this sacred day

🤲

تَقَبَّلَ اللهُ مِنَّا وَمِنْكُمْ

"May Allah accept (good deeds) from us and from you"

— Eid Greeting (Sunnah)
🌙

رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً

"Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter"

— Quran 2:201
⭐

إِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا

"Verily, with hardship comes ease"

— Quran 94:6

بَارَكَ اللهُ فِيكُمْ

تَقَبَّلَ اللهُ مِنَّا وَمِنْكُمْ

✦ Tap to reveal ✦

عِيدٌ مُبَارَكٌ وَسَعِيدٌ

Wishing you sweet moments, peace in your heart, and prosperity throughout the year. Eid Saeed! 💛

A Dua

اللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْنَا رَمَضَانَ

May every prayer be answered, every dream fulfilled. You deserve the very best. Eid Mubarak! ☪️
